findings.title: Privileged container
findings.description: Container is running in privileged mode, giving it full host access.
findings.remediation: Remove --privileged flag. Use specific capabilities instead.

findings.title: Docker socket mounted
findings.description: Docker socket is mounted into the container, allowing container escape.
findings.remediation: Avoid mounting Docker socket. Use Docker-in-Docker or rootless Docker.

findings.title: Secrets in environment variables
findings.description: Potential secrets found in env vars: DB_PASSWORD, API_KEY
findings.remediation: Use Docker secrets, mounted files, or a secrets manager instead.

findings.title: Running as root
findings.description: Container runs as root (User: not set).
findings.remediation: Set USER directive in Dockerfile or --user in docker run.
